title: Budapest Urban Transport
description: Adding the BKK metro trains into MTR! (minecraft transit railway!)
body:
This resource pack adds the GANZ MFAV, and a lot of Budapest signage.

and will soon have such trains and trams as: AM5-M2, MetroWagonMash 817.2k, AM4-M4,

And then will quite possibly have: Ganz CSMG, Tatra TCT5, Siemens Combino SUPRA, CAF urbos 3.
